stemHtml: To provide a pilot with the position of the aircraft in the absence of radar, ATC must have at its disposal at least…

options.a: three VDFs at different locations able to take simultaneous bearings on different frequencies.
options.b: two co-located VDFs, able to take bearings simultaneously on the transmitted frequency.
options.c: one VDF able to take simultaneous bearings on different frequencies.
options.d: two VDFs at different locations, able to take bearings simultaneously on the transmitted frequency.
